page: OVHcloud c3-320 is a compute-optimized server powered by an x86_64 AMD EPYC Milan processor. It features 160 dedicated physical cores running at 2.3 GHz with no hyperthreading, paired with 320 GB of RAM, which equates to 2.0 GB of memory per core. The hardware configuration includes a 400 GB local NVMe SSD and a baseline network bandwidth of 20 Gbps.

In benchmark evaluations, the c3-320 demonstrates top-tier multi-core CPU performance, placing in the top 10% for stress-ng multi-core and Passmark CPU tests. Its memory subsystem achieves top-tier cached read bandwidth of 9432.21 GB/sec and strong uncached read and write speeds. This high-throughput architecture translates to exceptional performance in parallel processing tasks, such as software compilation with Clang and ray tracing, both of which rank in the top 10%. Additionally, the server handles Redis SET operations at a top-tier rate of 173.62 million operations per second.

While single-core performance and LLM text generation speeds fall into the strong and average categories respectively, the sheer density of 160 dedicated physical cores provides excellent qualitative cost efficiency for highly parallelized workloads. The lack of hyperthreading ensures predictable, non-shared execution resources per vCPU. This profile makes the c3-320 highly suitable for compute-heavy workloads, including large-scale software compilation, multi-threaded decompression, high-throughput database operations, and intensive web serving.
description: OVHcloud c3-320 is a compute-optimized server featuring 160 dedicated physical cores on an x86_64 AMD EPYC Milan processor running at 2.3 GHz. It is configured with 320 GB of RAM, providing 2.0 GB of memory per core, alongside a 400 GB local NVMe SSD and 20 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. The server delivers top-tier multi-core CPU and memory bandwidth performance, ranking in the top 10% for Passmark CPU, software compilation, and Redis SET operations. Although single-core and LLM text generation speeds are moderate by comparison, the dedicated core architecture offers predictable performance and high resource density. It is highly suited for parallelized workloads such as software compilation, ray tracing, multi-threaded decompression, and high-throughput database operations.
og_description: OVHcloud c3-320 is a compute-optimized server with 160 dedicated AMD EPYC Milan cores, 320 GB RAM, and a 400 GB NVMe SSD, delivering top-tier multi-core and memory bandwidth performance.

tagline: A high-density, compute-optimized server featuring 160 dedicated cores for demanding parallel processing and high-throughput database workloads.
bullet_points: 160 dedicated AMD EPYC Milan physical cores with no hyperthreading
320 GB RAM and 400 GB local NVMe SSD storage
Top-tier multi-core CPU and cached memory bandwidth performance
Optimized for software compilation, ray tracing, and high-throughput Redis operations
